generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure reinforced my existing support for expanded domestic security powers by presenting a concrete example of its effectiveness in preventing terrorism. The emotional appeal of lives saved and the endorsement from local law enforcement resonated with my values of safety and trust in authorities.

request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news feed: our county sheriff's office just stopped a major terror plot thanks to new federal data-sharing tools. The feds didn't even need a warrant - they just used the new domestic security powers Congress passed last year. Our local guys said it saved lives. Why would anyone want to take these tools away from law enforcement? #KeepUsSafe #SupportOurSheriffs
